titleStmt.title: SII 23.157: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 157. (A.R. No. 157 of 1907.) Dēvamalai, Tirumayam Taluk, Tiruchirappalli District On the rock to the left of the maṇḍapa in the rock-cut temple

summary.p: This is dated merely in the cyclic year Manmatha, Āvaṇi 24. This may be of the same period as No. 156 above. It records the grant of some privileges in the temple (at Pēraiyūr ?) with its appurtenant land and house gift, by the Ūravar of Malaiyālaṅkuṟichchi (Mallāṅguḍi ?) in Paṉṟippaṟṟu of Virudarājabhayaṅkara-vaḷanāḍu, to a certain Piḷḷaimāmaṉ Poṉṉaṉ and his relations probably for their services (not clear).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . maṉmata varuṣam Āvaṇi ṭṭa 2 100 4 10 2 kānaṉāṭāna
virutarācapayaṅkara vaḷanāṭṭu paṉṟippaṟṟu malaiyālaṅkuṟucci
Ūrāka Icainta Ūravarom periyāṉ perai Ūṟ yaṉ
mākoṭiyāṟku piramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭutta paricāvatu Ūril
tevatāṉak kuṟaiyāka māḷuva kumārapaṭa kaiyil Itukku nālupaḻi
certtu Ippaṭikku potakkaṭavapaṭiyāle nām pati Ūrt tara veṇumeṉṟu
collukaiyil Intap piḷḷaimāmaṉ poṉṉaṉukkum Ivaṉuṭaiya Uṟ ṟamuṭaiyāṟkum
poruntave ppaṭiyate viṭṭa nilam muṉṟu māvukkum U kkum
vakai Ivvūr puravāṉa tevarvayalil nācuvaṉ nilamāṉa tevaṉvayak kalil
muṟṟum poṉṉaṉukku kiḷarar ṉil Uṭkkūṟum Ula
nilamāṉa valappoṉ vayakkal tayam Icceykku
ṇaṟṟil periyāṉvayakkal yiḻakkāṭu Oṉṟupāti nikki ṉiṉṟa mul laikkaru
melaiccikkal taccaṉmaṉaikku teṟkil maṉai Oṉṟum koyiṟ cukantiramum Ūṟ
ṟu peṟkum Aṟṟa mariyāti Oru kkum kuṭuttu Inta nilai Ūrile Iṟaikoṇṭu cantiṟāyittavaṟ
cella Iṟaiyilik kāṇiyākak kalveṭṭikkuṭuttom paṉṟippaṟṟu Ūrāka Icainta Ū
rom Ippaṭikku ṇakkapparaiyaṉ ttu vāṇavataraiyaṉ Eḻuttu tampikku nal
lāṉ Eḻuttu caiyāmāṇikkapparaiyaṉ Eḻuttu Aṭantavarkaḷ kālap parai
yaṉ Eḻuttu camaiyamāṇikkapparaiyaṉ Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 23.157 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
